name: Murders at Karlov Manor

play.notes: 14 game cards + 1 art card / token / ad insert. A List or Special Guest card may occupy a common slot. 36 packs per box.

statedRates: Observed uncommon wildcard rate ~52% (JP). Common wildcard appears within normal runs.
sourceNotes: Play boosters newly introduced with this set; no Draft boosters. Site documents Japanese sequential collation runs in detail; English drop rates not published on the page.
skipReason: Superseded by a hand-authored recipe derived from the official Wizards 'Collecting' article (more accurate odds + full product lineup). The generator must NOT overwrite data/booster-contents/mkm.json.
